hero.subtitle: PrimeFx Invest verbindet KI-Technologie, globale Märkte und Expertenstrategien, um Ihr Vermögen konstant und sicher zu steigern.

whyChoose.title: Warum Tausende uns wählen
whyChoose.subtitle: Wir verbinden modernste Technologie mit bewährten Anlagestrategien für konstante, sichere Renditen auf jedem Niveau.

features.title: KI-Vorsprung
features.description: Unsere proprietäre KI analysiert globale Märkte rund um die Uhr, um Chancen mit hoher Wahrscheinlichkeit früh zu erkennen.

features.title: Vielfältige Chancen
features.description: Zugang zu Forex, Rohstoffen, Indizes und digitalen Assets in über 150 Ländern — alles auf einer Plattform.

features.title: Bank-Level-Sicherheit
features.description: 256-Bit-SSL, Cold Storage und Multi-Faktor-Authentifizierung schützen Ihre Mittel und Daten.

features.title: Expertenmanagement
features.description: Ein Team erfahrener Analysten und Portfoliomanager arbeitet mit der KI zusammen, um Ihre Renditen zu maximieren.

features.title: Transparent & fair
features.description: Keine versteckten Gebühren. Echtzeit-Tracking und detaillierte Berichte.

features.title: Menschlicher Support 24/7
features.description: Unser Support-Team ist rund um die Uhr per Chat, E-Mail und Telefon erreichbar.

items.quote: PrimeFx Invest completely changed how I approach investing. The AI recommendations are spot-on, and I've seen consistent returns month after month.
items.name: Sarah Mitchell

items.quote: I was skeptical at first, but the transparency and 24/7 support won me over. My portfolio has grown 34% in just 8 months. Highly recommended!
items.name: James Okafor

items.quote: As a busy professional, I don't have time to manage investments. PrimeFx does it all for me — secure, profitable, and completely hands-off.
items.name: Elena Rodriguez

faq.title: Häufig gestellte Fragen
faq.subtitle: Alles, was Sie vor dem Start wissen müssen.

items.question: Is PrimeAI Invest safe and secure?
items.answer: Yes. We use 256-bit SSL encryption, cold storage wallets, two-factor authentication, and are fully compliant with global financial regulations.

items.question: What is the minimum investment amount?
items.answer: You can start with as little as $50 on our Starter Plan. Higher-tier plans have higher minimums but offer greater return potential.

items.question: How often can I withdraw my profits?
items.answer: Withdrawals are processed every 7 days on all plans. You can also access your capital anytime with no lock-in periods.

items.question: How does the AI investment system work?
items.answer: Our proprietary AI analyzes thousands of market signals in real time and executes trades through our expert management team to optimize your portfolio.

items.question: What returns can I realistically expect?
items.answer: Returns vary by plan and market conditions. Our Starter Plan targets 8–15% monthly ROI, while Elite plans can reach 40–60%. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

items.question: Do I need investment experience to get started?
items.answer: Not at all. PrimeFx Invest is designed for everyone — from complete beginners to seasoned investors. Our platform handles everything for you.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept bank transfers, credit/debit cards, and major cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin and Ethereum.

items.question: Is there a mobile app available?
items.answer: Yes! Our mobile app is available on both iOS and Android, giving you full access to your portfolio, deposits, withdrawals, and support on the go.
